details.test: Task 1: Save two qualifying entry-level admin jobs near 94110
Task 2: Register for an evening resume workshop between May 12–18
Task 3: Bookmark shorter qualifying training program under 12 weeks
Task 4: Complete career interests assessment and open top occupation
Task 5: Schedule 30-minute career coaching appointment on Wednesday afternoon
Task 6: Create resume with two work experiences and one education entry
Task 7: Enroll in short (<=4h) self-paced online interview course
Task 8: Join technology mentorship program with 4+ star mentor
Task 9: Add three recent interview articles to reading list
